chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-210 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5241/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.1140/2022 4. For hearing of main case 21.04.2022 Mr. Rizwan Ali Lashari, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. We have perused the petition and it appears that the petitioner has sought injunctive order against respondent No.7 i.e Abdul Majeed S/o Muhammad Bukhsh. We are afraid that in this private dispute a writ would not lie. Petitioner may pursue his revision application, which is pending before respondent No.1, who may decide it in accordance with law at the earliest. Petition alongwith listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
